new.intro: I'll guide you through creating a comprehensive project plan by asking a series of questions. This will take about 5-10 minutes.
new.whatYouGet:
At the end, I'll generate a detailed PROJECT_PLAN.md file with:
- Project architecture diagrams
- Technology stack breakdown
- Phased implementation tasks
- Progress tracking system
- Success criteria
new.projectType: What type of project are you building?
new.description: Brief description of what the project does (1-2 sentences)?
new.reviewPlan: 1. Review the plan and adjust as needed
new.getNextTask: 2. Start with: /next (to get the next task)

next.title: 🎯 Recommended Next Task
next.noTasks: ⚠️ No tasks currently available to work on.
next.reviewDependencies: 3. Review dependencies if tasks seem stuck
next.greatWork: Great work on completing this project! 🚀
next.assignedHint: This task is already assigned. Consider picking an unassigned task.
next.youAreAssigned: This task is assigned to you - ready to work on!
next.considerFinishing: 💡 Tip: Consider finishing in-progress tasks before starting new ones:
next.stillWantNew: Still want to start something new? Here's the recommendation:

github.prAwaitingHint: PR is awaiting review - finish the review cycle!

update.startAction: start  - Mark task as in progress (TODO → IN_PROGRESS)
update.doneAction: done   - Mark task as completed (ANY → DONE)
update.blockAction: block  - Mark task as blocked (ANY → BLOCKED)
update.taskNotFound: ❌ Error: Task {taskId} not found in PROJECT_PLAN.md
update.checkTasksSection: Tip: Check the "Tasks & Implementation Plan" section for valid task IDs.
update.planNotFound: ❌ Error: PROJECT_PLAN.md not found in current directory.
update.runPlanNew: Please run /new first to create a project plan.
update.tipDocumentBlocker: 💡 Tip: Document the blocker in the task description:
update.whatNeeded: - What needs to happen to unblock it?
update.considerNewTask: Consider creating a new task to resolve the blocker.
update.autoSyncTokenExpired: Token may be expired. Run /login to re-authenticate.
update.autoSyncTaskNotFound: Task not found on cloud. Run /sync push to sync full plan.
update.autoSyncTryLater: Try /sync push later to manually sync.
update.hybridConflictMessage: Task was modified on cloud. Use /sync to resolve.
update.hybridQueued: 📤 Queued for sync when online ({count} pending)
update.hybridSyncWhenOnline: 💡 Run /sync when back online to push changes
update.assignedToYou: 👤 This task is assigned to you - ready to work on!
update.assignedWarning: This task belongs to another team member. Updating it may cause confusion.
update.assignedWorkloadTip: 💡 Tip: Check /pfWorkload to see team task distribution
update.forceSkipping: ⚡ Force flag detected - skipping assignment check
update.presenceWorkingOn: 🟢 Broadcasting: Working on {taskId} to team members
update.presenceQueued: 📤 Presence update queued (will broadcast when connected)
update.presenceFailed: ⚠️ Could not broadcast presence (local update succeeded)

export.githubFormat: github    - Create GitHub Issues with labels
export.ghInstall: To export to GitHub Issues, install GitHub CLI:

spec.intro: I'll analyze your specification document and create a comprehensive project plan.
spec.clarifyingQuestions: I have some clarifying questions based on the specification:
spec.selectTechStack: Which technologies would you like to use?
spec.selectPriority: Which features should be in MVP (Phase 1)?
spec.reviewRecommended: 💡 Review the plan and adjust task details as needed
spec.planExists: ⚠️ PROJECT_PLAN.md already exists in this directory.
spec.overwriteQuestion: What would you like to do?
spec.overwriteDesc: Replace with new plan from specification

login.invalidToken: ❌ Invalid API token. Please check and try again.
login.alreadyLoggedIn: ⚠️ You are already logged in as {email}

logout.notLoggedIn: ⚠️ You are not currently logged in.

sync.title: 🔄 Sync
sync.conflictDetails: Both local and cloud have been modified since last sync.
sync.notLinked: ❌ Project not linked to cloud. Run /cloud link first.

cloud.title: ☁️ Cloud Projects
cloud.createFirst: Create your first project with /cloud new
cloud.linkDetails: Local PROJECT_PLAN.md is now linked to:
cloud.unlinkDetails: Local project is no longer linked to cloud.
cloud.syncNow: Run /sync push to upload your plan.

settings.title: ⚙️ Plan Plugin Settings
settings.englishDesc: Use English for all plugin interactions
settings.newLanguageUsedFor: The new language will be used for:
settings.autoSyncDescription: When enabled, /update commands will automatically sync changes to PlanFlow cloud.
settings.autoSyncNowEnabled: Changes will now sync automatically after /update commands.
settings.autoSyncNowDisabled: Changes will no longer sync automatically.
settings.storageModeCloudDesc: Cloud is source of truth, local is cache
settings.storageModeHybridDesc: Both local and cloud with smart merge (recommended)
settings.storageModeLoginFirst: Please run /login first to use cloud features.
settings.storageModeLocalBehavior:
• Changes saved to PROJECT_PLAN.md only
• No automatic cloud sync
• Use /sync push to manually sync
settings.storageModeCloudBehavior:
• Cloud is authoritative source
• Local file is a cache
• All changes sync immediately
settings.storageModeHybridBehavior:
• Both local and cloud kept in sync
• Smart merge for concurrent changes
• Works offline, syncs when online
